## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content marketing services to Deliberately.ai and explore potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content marketing services, leveraging AI workflows and expert teams to drive organic traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Deliberately.ai is in early stages of content marketing, seeking to balance short-term (outbound) and long-term (inbound) growth strategies](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [GrowthX's offering includes a 20K strategy sprint followed by 15K/month execution with daily publishing (5 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Earliest kickoff available is mid-October due to high demand; Hans to discuss internally and follow up via email](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

## Topics

### Deliberately.ai's Current Content Marketing Status

  - [Hans has been handling content creation himself, finding it time-consuming](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Current efforts: blog posts, contributing to publications, podcasts](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Limited organic traffic growth despite SEO efforts](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [\~10 production customers, hardening product based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Aiming to start selling "in earnest" within 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Differentiators

  - [End-to-end partner: SEO/GEO strategy, content creation, daily CMS publishing](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Focus on driving high-intent organic traffic through editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Leverages AI workflows with experts-in-loop (e.g., ex-TechCrunch editor)](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Two-phase engagement: Strategy sprint (20K) + Growth execution (15K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Daily publishing targeting 5 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Handles entire process including CMS staging/publishing (e.g., in Framer)](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Creation Process

  - [Develops rich artifacts on company and audience personas](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [Multi-step workflow: brief, research, outline, draft, fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Utilizes agentic workflows for research quality assurance](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [Knowledge base integration for leveraging client resources](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)

### Client Engagement and Results

  - [Weekly syncs during strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [Shared Slack channel, Notion page, and internal platform for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [Demonstrated success stories (e.g., Augment's 10x organic traffic growth in 6 months)](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [No specific guarantees, but emphasis on trust in the process and expert team](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to send Statement of Work (SoW) for Hans to review](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [Hans to discuss internally with co-founder](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Hans to email Tyler with decision on how to proceed](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [If interested, schedule follow-up meeting to dive deeper or secure kickoff date](https://fathom.video/share/3j_Yspo-msMoydj7TzyG7QHyF-wKu9k_?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
